arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists he IS the man to turn Man United around - but says Europa League glory will not solve their problems
arts.sum: United face Real Sociedad in the last 16 of the Europa League on Thursday hoping to take a backdoor route into next season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim defends overlooking Man Utd star for Europa League squad amid scoring woes
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim and Manchester United were allowed to change up their Europa League squad ahead of their knockout fixtures in the competition but overlooked one star

arts.ttl: 'They don't know what football is' - Real Sociedad boss makes Man United Europa League claim
arts.sum: Real Sociedad chief Imanol Alguacil believes Manchester United are firm favourites to progress from their Europa League last-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho next manager's job hint, Man United return, Turkish Super Lig controversy
arts.sum: The charismatic former Manchester United manager has been the headlines yet again this week ahead of a return to Europa League action with Fenerbahce.

arts.ttl: Romano GUARANTEE: Man Utd target will '100%' move
arts.sum: Manchester United target Angel Gomes will '100 per cent leave Lille ' this summer, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, Gomes will '100 per cent leave Lille' at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Real Sociedad: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injuries for Europa League
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim dealt blow double blow for biggest game of the season yet

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim aware of ‘consequences’ for Manchester United’s ‘lack of results’
arts.sum: United will look to bounce back when they face Real Sociedad in the last 16 of the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim defends Man United's failure to register 17-year-old star Chido Obi in the Europa League
arts.sum: The 17-year-old striker has been prolific for United's youth teams and came off the bench in three of the last four games with Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee struggling in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Frustrated Ruben Amorim makes Man Utd sack admission and refuses to change style of play
arts.sum: The Manchester United boss is coming under increasing pressure after the slow start to his tenure, and he says he knows what could happen if results continue to be poor

arts.ttl: Amorim doubles down: We don't have to win Europa League to improve
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has doubled down on his comments that Manchester United do not have to win this season's Europa League to make steps forward - claiming the club can still attract top players without Champions League football next term.
